block.title: Reposify Setup
block.text:
<script type="text/javascript">
        $(function(){
        var username_div = $('#item-\\/storage\\/passwords\\/_new\\/name');
        username_div.hide();
        var username_input = $('#\\/storage\\/passwords\\/_new\\/name_id');
        username_input.val('api_key');
        });
        </script>
